description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, angular profile and a robust, tracked chassis designed for urban operations. The exterior is predominantly blue and black, adorned with stylized character graphics and insignia, giving it a unique, customized appearance. The vehicle features a large, reinforced turret equipped with multiple visible weapon mounts, including what appear to be missile launchers and a central cannon. The sides and top are covered with thick, modular armor plating, and the tracks are protected by side skirts. The vehicle's surface is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, and it displays several military-style markings and emblems. The overall build suggests a focus on both protection and firepower, with ample space for crew entry and operation.
description: A blue and black armored combat vehicle with tracked wheels, heavy turret weaponry, and stylized character graphics, designed for urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced sloped armor, central cannon, and prominent character graphics on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long tracked chassis, side-mounted missile launchers, and detailed side graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, rear hatch, and additional markings, with the turret and weapon mounts visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tracks, turret, and side graphics, with clear visibility of the vehicle's length.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Four visible weapon mounts: one large central cannon on the turret, two side-mounted missile launchers on the turret, and one smaller weapon mount on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, modular armor plating; sloped front and side skirts; reinforced turret and hatches.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: No camouflage; solid blue and black paint scheme with stylized character graphics and insignia.
attribute_military_markings: Visible insignia and emblems on the hood, turret, and sides; white text and logos integrated with the graphics.
